message:
Add zero-copy string reads, multi-root streaming, batch pagination

Zig changes:
- Replace writeString (copy+decode) with skipString (SIMD scan only),
  returning src_end + has_escapes flag for JS-side lazy decode
- Add doc_get_input_ptr export for direct WASM memory string reads
- Add stream_get_buffer_len, stream_reset_for_next exports for
  multi-root NDJSON streaming
- Add batch_buffer continuation token for >16K element pagination
- Update doc_array_elements/doc_object_keys with resume_at parameter

Tests:
- Add large container tests (17K elements/keys, batch boundary crossing)
- Add escape flag detection tests (no-escape, backslash, unicode, surrogates)

Bench:
- Restructure AI parser benchmark to compare original vs VectorJSON-patched
  for each product (Vercel, TanStack, Anthropic)
